_comment: OSF Body Physics female jiggle profile. Bones bind by name; ones absent from the loaded skeleton are skipped (warned once). VANILLA has only L_Butt/R_Butt — L_Pecs/R_Pecs/C_Belly need an extended skeleton (e.g. SF Extended Skeleton) AND a body/outfit mesh weighted to those bones, else moving the bone won't deform anything. Names here match the SF-Extended-Skeleton convention seen in the Jiggle Physics mod's skeleton.nif; confirm against the 'ALL node names' dump in the log after installing yours. 'bone' = node to jiggle; parent frame is auto-derived (so 'parent' is ignored). stiffness/damping/gravity/maxOffset are per local axis [x,y,z]: stiffness=snappiness, damping=settle speed, maxOffset=max travel (the cone-limit analog).
